pageContext.name: Blood Angels Furioso Dreadnought Brother Samel
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Joytoy are proud to present the Blood Angels Furioso Dreadnought Brother Samel!  Joy Toy brings the Blood Angels from Warhammer 40k to life with this new series of 1/18 scale figures. Furioso Dreadnought Brother Samel includes articulated hands and body and stands over 7' tall.  Warhammer 40k fans, be sure to add the Blood Angels Furioso Dreadnought Brother Samel to your collection today!
